---
title: "General Conference Bingo"
output:
  html_document:
    includes:
      in_header: "../docs/header.html"
      after_body: "../docs/footer.html"
---

<style>
h1.title {
display: none;
}

.gb-bingo-card-shell {
background: #ffffff;
border: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.28);
border-radius: 22px;
padding: 20px;
box-shadow: 0 12px 30px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
}

.gb-bingo-preview-wrap {
display: flex;
justify-content: center;
}

.gb-bingo-card {
width: min(820px, 100%);
aspect-ratio: 8.5 / 11;
background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%);
border: 2px solid #0f172a;
padding: 24px 24px 18px;
color: #0f172a;
display: grid;
grid-template-rows: auto 1fr auto;
gap: 14px;
box-sizing: border-box;
}

.gb-bingo-card__header,
.gb-bingo-card__footer {
display: flex;
justify-content: space-between;
align-items: flex-start;
gap: 12px;
}

.gb-bingo-card__footer {
align-items: flex-end;
min-height: 26px;
}

.gb-bingo-card__eyebrow {
margin: 0;
font-size: 0.78rem;
font-weight: 700;
line-height: 1.15;
letter-spacing: 0.02em;
color: #475569;
text-transform: capitalize;
}

.gb-bingo-card__title {
margin: 0;
font-size: 1.45rem;
font-weight: 800;
line-height: 1.05;
letter-spacing: 0.01em;
}

.gb-bingo-card__logo,
.gb-bingo-card__footer-logo {
display: block;
object-fit: contain;
opacity: 0.4;
filter: grayscale(100%);
}

.gb-bingo-card__logo {
width: 68px;
height: 68px;
}

.gb-bingo-card__main {
display: flex;
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
overflow: hidden;
}

.gb-bingo-grid-frame {
width: var(--grid-size, 100%);
height: var(--grid-size, auto);
max-width: 100%;
max-height: 100%;
aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
display: flex;
align-items: stretch;
justify-content: stretch;
}

.gb-bingo-grid {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: repeat(5, minmax(0, 1fr));
grid-template-rows: repeat(5, minmax(0, 1fr));
width: 100%;
height: 100%;
border: 2px solid #0f172a;
background: #ffffff;
}

.gb-bingo-cell {
border-right: 1.5px solid #0f172a;
border-bottom: 1.5px solid #0f172a;
padding: 8px;
display: flex;
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
text-align: center;
background: #ffffff;
overflow: hidden;
box-sizing: border-box;
min-width: 0;
min-height: 0;
}

.gb-bingo-cell:nth-child(5n) {
border-right: none;
}

.gb-bingo-cell:nth-last-child(-n + 5) {
border-bottom: none;
}

.gb-bingo-cell--free {
background: #eff6ff;
}

.gb-bingo-cell__word {
display: block;
max-width: 100%;
font-size: 16px;
line-height: 1.08;
font-weight: 800;
letter-spacing: 0.01em;
text-transform: uppercase;
text-align: center;
overflow: hidden;
word-break: normal;
overflow-wrap: normal;
hyphens: none;
white-space: nowrap;
text-wrap: pretty;
}

.gb-bingo-card__footer-brand {
display: inline-flex;
align-items: center;
gap: 8px;
font-size: 0.72rem;
line-height: 1.1;
font-weight: 700;
color: #475569;
opacity: 0.72;
text-align: right;
}

.gb-bingo-card__footer-logo {
width: 18px;
height: 18px;
}

.gb-generator-grid {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: 1fr auto;
gap: 14px;
align-items: end;
}

.gb-generator-grid__count {
min-width: 170px;
}

.gb-config-note {
margin-top: 12px;
color: #64748b;
font-size: 0.84rem;
line-height: 1.5;
}

.gb-pdf-render-stage {
position: fixed;
left: -99999px;
top: 0;
width: 816px;
pointer-events: none;
opacity: 0;
contain: layout style paint;
}

.gb-bingo-empty {
padding: 36px 18px;
text-align: center;
color: #64748b;
font-style: italic;
}

.gb-label-with-tip {
display: inline-flex;
align-items: center;
gap: 8px;
}

.gb-label-with-tip .gb-field__label {
margin: 0;
}

@media (max-width: 900px) {
.gb-generator-grid {
grid-template-columns: 1fr;
}

.gb-generator-grid__count {
min-width: 0;
}

.gb-bingo-card {
padding: 18px 18px 14px;
gap: 10px;
}

.gb-bingo-card__logo {
width: 56px;
height: 56px;
}
}

@media (max-width: 680px) {
.gb-bingo-card {
padding: 14px 14px 12px;
}

.gb-bingo-cell {
padding: 6px;
}

.gb-bingo-card__title {
font-size: 1.1rem;
}

.gb-bingo-card__eyebrow {
font-size: 0.68rem;
}
}
</style>

<link rel="stylesheet" href="../search/search-common.css">
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/html2canvas@1.4.1/dist/html2canvas.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/jspdf@2.5.1/dist/jspdf.umd.min.js"></script>

<div class="gb-search-shell" id="conferenceBingoApp">

<section class="gb-search-card gb-search-card--settings-top">
<details class="gb-settings-dropdown">
<summary class="gb-settings-dropdown__summary">
<span class="gb-settings-dropdown__title">Bingo settings</span>
<span class="gb-settings-dropdown__meta">Difficulty, year range, and print options</span>
</summary>

<div class="gb-settings-dropdown__body">

<div class="gb-form-grid gb-form-grid--2 gb-form-grid--aligned">
<div class="gb-field">
<label class="gb-field__label" for="bingoYearFrom">Year from</label>
<input id="bingoYearFrom" class="gb-input" type="number" inputmode="numeric" placeholder="2000">
</div>

<div class="gb-field">
<label class="gb-field__label" for="bingoYearTo">Year to</label>
<input id="bingoYearTo" class="gb-input" type="number" inputmode="numeric" placeholder="2025">
</div>
</div>

<div class="gb-form-grid gb-form-grid--2 gb-form-grid--aligned">
<div class="gb-field">
<div class="gb-label-with-tip">
<label class="gb-field__label" for="bingoDifficulty">Difficulty</label>
<button type="button" class="gb-info-chip" aria-label="Difficulty help" title="Easy uses the most common Gospel-focused conference words. Medium uses moderately common words. Hard uses less common but still recognizable conference words. Random mixes all three pools.">ⓘ</button>
</div>
<select id="bingoDifficulty" class="gb-select">
<option value="easy">Easy</option>
<option value="medium">Medium</option>
<option value="hard">Hard</option>
<option value="random">Random</option>
</select>
</div>

<div class="gb-field">
<span class="gb-field__label">Free space</span>
<label class="gb-checkbox" for="bingoUseFreeSpace">
<input id="bingoUseFreeSpace" type="checkbox" checked>
<span>Use a free center square</span>
</label>
</div>
</div>

<div class="gb-btn-row gb-btn-row--settings">
<button type="button" class="gb-btn gb-btn--ghost" id="bingoResetButton">Reset settings to defaults</button>
</div>

</div>
</details>
</section>

<section class="gb-search-card gb-search-card--search">
<div class="gb-search-card__heading gb-search-card__heading--compact">
<div>
<h2 class="gb-search-card__title">Generate bingo cards</h2>
<p class="gb-search-card__subtitle">Preview one possible card, then generate printable bingo sheet PDFs.</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="gb-generator-grid">
<div class="gb-btn-row">
<button type="button" class="gb-btn gb-btn--primary" id="bingoGenerateButton">Generate new card</button>
<button type="button" class="gb-btn gb-btn--secondary" id="bingoPrintSheetsButton" disabled>Print Bingo Sheets</button>
</div>

<div class="gb-field gb-generator-grid__count">
<label class="gb-field__label" for="bingoPdfCount">Pages</label>
<select id="bingoPdfCount" class="gb-select">
<option value="1">1 page</option>
<option value="2">2 pages</option>
<option value="3">3 pages</option>
<option value="4">4 pages</option>
<option value="5">5 pages</option>
<option value="6">6 pages</option>
<option value="7">7 pages</option>
<option value="8">8 pages</option>
<option value="9">9 pages</option>
<option value="10">10 pages</option>
</select>
</div>
</div>

<div id="bingoStatus" class="gb-status" aria-live="polite"></div>
<div class="gb-config-note">Preview shows one possible card from the current settings. Printed sheets are generated fresh each time from the same difficulty and year range.</div>
</section>

<section class="gb-search-card">
<div class="gb-search-card__heading gb-search-card__heading--compact">
<div>
<h2 class="gb-search-card__title">Current bingo card preview</h2>
<p class="gb-search-card__subtitle" id="bingoSummary">Loading conference words…</p>
</div>
</div>

<div id="bingoPrintArea" class="gb-bingo-preview-wrap">
<div class="gb-bingo-empty">Preparing conference word pools…</div>
</div>
</section>

<div id="pdfRenderStage" class="gb-pdf-render-stage" aria-hidden="true"></div>

</div>

<script>
const BINGO_CONFIG = {
datasetUrl: 'https://kameronyork.com/datasets/general-conference-talks.json',
allowedWordsUrl: 'https://kameronyork.com/datasets/conference-bingo-allowed-words.json',
logoUrl: 'https://www.mygospelbuddy.com/docs/assets/gospel-buddy-icon.png',
defaultYearFrom: 2000,
defaultDifficulty: 'easy',
defaultUseFreeSpace: true,
maxPdfCards: 10,
minAverageMentionsPerConference: 1.25,
easyMinAveragePerConference: 5.5,
mediumMinAveragePerConference: 3,
mediumMaxAveragePerConference: 5.5,
hardMinAveragePerConference: 1.75,
hardMaxAveragePerConference: 3.25
};

const state = {
rawTalks: [],
processedTalks: [],
yearRange: { min: null, max: null },
cache: new Map(),
currentCard: null,
ready: false,
allowedWords: new Set(),
normalizationMap: {}
};

const elements = {};

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
cacheElements();
bindEvents();
prepareConferenceData().catch((error) => {
console.error(error);
setStatus('error', 'Gospel Buddy could not prepare the conference word pools. Please try refreshing the page.');
});
});

function cacheElements() {
elements.yearFrom = document.getElementById('bingoYearFrom');
elements.yearTo = document.getElementById('bingoYearTo');
elements.difficulty = document.getElementById('bingoDifficulty');
elements.useFreeSpace = document.getElementById('bingoUseFreeSpace');
elements.pdfCount = document.getElementById('bingoPdfCount');
elements.generate = document.getElementById('bingoGenerateButton');
elements.printSheets = document.getElementById('bingoPrintSheetsButton');
elements.reset = document.getElementById('bingoResetButton');
elements.status = document.getElementById('bingoStatus');
elements.summary = document.getElementById('bingoSummary');
elements.printArea = document.getElementById('bingoPrintArea');
elements.pdfStage = document.getElementById('pdfRenderStage');
}

function bindEvents() {
elements.generate.addEventListener('click', () => generateAndRenderCard(true));
elements.printSheets.addEventListener('click', exportPdfBatch);
elements.reset.addEventListener('click', resetSettings);
}

async function prepareConferenceData() {
setStatus('info', 'Preparing conference word pools…', true);

const [datasetResponse, allowedResponse] = await Promise.all([
fetch(BINGO_CONFIG.datasetUrl, {
cache: 'force-cache',
credentials: 'omit'
}),
fetch(BINGO_CONFIG.allowedWordsUrl, {
cache: 'force-cache',
credentials: 'omit'
})
]);

if (!datasetResponse.ok) {
throw new Error(`Dataset request failed with status ${datasetResponse.status}`);
}

if (!allowedResponse.ok) {
throw new Error(`Allowed word list request failed with status ${allowedResponse.status}`);
}

const data = await datasetResponse.json();
const allowedConfig = await allowedResponse.json();

if (!Array.isArray(data) || data.length === 0) {
throw new Error('The conference talks dataset did not return any talks.');
}

initializeAllowedWords(allowedConfig);

state.rawTalks = data;
state.processedTalks = data
.filter((row) => row && typeof row.text === 'string' && Number.isFinite(Number(row.year)))
.map((row) => {
const year = Number(row.year);
const month = String(row.month || '').trim() || 'Unknown';
const conferenceKey = `${year}-${month}`;
return {
year,
month,
conferenceKey,
wordCounts: buildWordCounts(row.text)
};
});

const years = state.processedTalks.map((talk) => talk.year).filter((year) => Number.isFinite(year));
state.yearRange.min = Math.min(...years);
state.yearRange.max = Math.max(...years);

const defaultFrom = Math.max(BINGO_CONFIG.defaultYearFrom, state.yearRange.min);
elements.yearFrom.value = String(defaultFrom);
elements.yearTo.value = String(state.yearRange.max);
elements.yearFrom.min = String(state.yearRange.min);
elements.yearFrom.max = String(state.yearRange.max);
elements.yearTo.min = String(state.yearRange.min);
elements.yearTo.max = String(state.yearRange.max);
elements.difficulty.value = BINGO_CONFIG.defaultDifficulty;
elements.useFreeSpace.checked = BINGO_CONFIG.defaultUseFreeSpace;
elements.pdfCount.value = '1';

state.ready = true;
elements.printSheets.disabled = false;

setStatus('success', 'Conference word pools are ready.');
generateAndRenderCard(false);
}

function initializeAllowedWords(config) {
const allowedWords = Array.isArray(config && config.allowedWords) ? config.allowedWords : [];
const normalizationMap = (config && typeof config.normalizationMap === 'object' && config.normalizationMap) ? config.normalizationMap : {};

state.allowedWords = new Set(
allowedWords
.map((word) => String(word || '').trim().toLowerCase())
.filter(Boolean)
);

state.normalizationMap = {};
Object.keys(normalizationMap).forEach((key) => {
const normalizedKey = String(key || '').trim().toLowerCase();
const normalizedValue = String(normalizationMap[key] || '').trim().toLowerCase();
if (normalizedKey && normalizedValue) {
state.normalizationMap[normalizedKey] = normalizedValue;
}
});

if (state.allowedWords.size === 0) {
throw new Error('The allowed Gospel word list is empty.');
}
}

function buildWordCounts(text) {
const counts = new Map();
const tokens = tokenizeText(text);

for (const token of tokens) {
counts.set(token, (counts.get(token) || 0) + 1);
}

return counts;
}

function tokenizeText(text) {
const cleaned = String(text || '')
.toLowerCase()
.replace(/[\u2018\u2019]/g, "'")
.replace(/[^a-z'\s-]/g, ' ')
.replace(/-/g, ' ');

const rawTokens = cleaned.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
const acceptedTokens = [];

for (let token of rawTokens) {
token = token.replace(/^'+|'+$/g, '').replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '');
if (!token) {
continue;
}

const normalized = normalizeWord(token);
if (!normalized) {
continue;
}

acceptedTokens.push(normalized);
}

return acceptedTokens;
}

function normalizeWord(word) {
let normalized = String(word || '').toLowerCase().trim();

if (!normalized) {
return '';
}

normalized = normalized.replace(/^'+|'+$/g, '');
normalized = normalized.replace(/^[^a-z]+|[^a-z]+$/g, '');

if (!normalized) {
return '';
}

if (normalized.endsWith("'s")) {
normalized = normalized.slice(0, -2);
}

if (state.normalizationMap[normalized]) {
const mapped = state.normalizationMap[normalized];
return state.allowedWords.has(mapped) ? mapped : '';
}

if (state.allowedWords.has(normalized)) {
return normalized;
}

const singular = singularizeWord(normalized);
if (!singular) {
return '';
}

if (state.normalizationMap[singular]) {
const mapped = state.normalizationMap[singular];
return state.allowedWords.has(mapped) ? mapped : '';
}

if (state.allowedWords.has(singular)) {
return singular;
}

return '';
}

function singularizeWord(word) {
if (!word) {
return '';
}

if (word.endsWith('ies') && word.length > 4) {
return word.slice(0, -3) + 'y';
}

if (/(ches|shes|sses|xes|zes)$/.test(word) && word.length > 4) {
return word.slice(0, -2);
}

if (word.endsWith('s') && word.length > 4 && !word.endsWith('ss') && !word.endsWith('us')) {
return word.slice(0, -1);
}

return word;
}

function getSettings() {
const yearFrom = clampNumber(elements.yearFrom.value, state.yearRange.min, state.yearRange.max, Math.max(BINGO_CONFIG.defaultYearFrom, state.yearRange.min));
const yearTo = clampNumber(elements.yearTo.value, state.yearRange.min, state.yearRange.max, state.yearRange.max);

return {
yearFrom: Math.min(yearFrom, yearTo),
yearTo: Math.max(yearFrom, yearTo),
difficulty: elements.difficulty.value || BINGO_CONFIG.defaultDifficulty,
useFreeSpace: elements.useFreeSpace.checked,
pdfCount: clampNumber(elements.pdfCount.value, 1, BINGO_CONFIG.maxPdfCards, 1)
};
}

function resetSettings() {
if (state.yearRange.min === null || state.yearRange.max === null) {
return;
}

elements.yearFrom.value = String(Math.max(BINGO_CONFIG.defaultYearFrom, state.yearRange.min));
elements.yearTo.value = String(state.yearRange.max);
elements.difficulty.value = BINGO_CONFIG.defaultDifficulty;
elements.useFreeSpace.checked = BINGO_CONFIG.defaultUseFreeSpace;
elements.pdfCount.value = '1';
generateAndRenderCard(false);
}

function clampNumber(value, min, max, fallback) {
const numeric = Number(value);
if (!Number.isFinite(numeric)) {
return fallback;
}
return Math.min(Math.max(Math.round(numeric), min), max);
}

function getWordStatsForRange(yearFrom, yearTo) {
const cacheKey = `${yearFrom}-${yearTo}`;
if (state.cache.has(cacheKey)) {
return state.cache.get(cacheKey);
}

const talks = state.processedTalks.filter((talk) => talk.year >= yearFrom && talk.year <= yearTo);
const conferenceKeys = Array.from(new Set(talks.map((talk) => talk.conferenceKey)));
const conferenceCount = conferenceKeys.length;

if (conferenceCount === 0) {
const emptyResult = { stats: [], conferenceCount: 0, talkCount: 0 };
state.cache.set(cacheKey, emptyResult);
return emptyResult;
}

const statMap = new Map();

for (const talk of talks) {
for (const [word, count] of talk.wordCounts.entries()) {
if (!statMap.has(word)) {
statMap.set(word, {
word,
totalCount: 0,
talkCount: 0,
conferenceCounts: new Map()
});
}

const entry = statMap.get(word);
entry.totalCount += count;
entry.talkCount += 1;
entry.conferenceCounts.set(talk.conferenceKey, (entry.conferenceCounts.get(talk.conferenceKey) || 0) + count);
}
}

const stats = Array.from(statMap.values())
.map((entry) => {
const conferenceMentionCount = entry.conferenceCounts.size;
const avgPerConference = entry.totalCount / conferenceCount;
return {
word: entry.word,
totalCount: entry.totalCount,
talkCount: entry.talkCount,
conferenceMentionCount,
avgPerConference
};
})
.filter((entry) => entry.avgPerConference >= BINGO_CONFIG.minAverageMentionsPerConference)
.sort((left, right) => {
if (right.avgPerConference !== left.avgPerConference) {
return right.avgPerConference - left.avgPerConference;
}
if (right.totalCount !== left.totalCount) {
return right.totalCount - left.totalCount;
}
return left.word.localeCompare(right.word);
});

const result = {
stats,
conferenceCount,
talkCount: talks.length
};

state.cache.set(cacheKey, result);
return result;
}

function getDifficultyPool(stats, difficulty) {
const ranked = stats.slice();

const easyBase = ranked.filter((entry) => entry.avgPerConference >= BINGO_CONFIG.easyMinAveragePerConference);
const mediumBase = ranked.filter((entry) => entry.avgPerConference >= BINGO_CONFIG.mediumMinAveragePerConference && entry.avgPerConference < BINGO_CONFIG.mediumMaxAveragePerConference);
const hardBase = ranked.filter((entry) => entry.avgPerConference >= BINGO_CONFIG.hardMinAveragePerConference && entry.avgPerConference < BINGO_CONFIG.hardMaxAveragePerConference);

const easy = uniqueByWord(easyBase.length >= 35 ? easyBase : ranked.slice(0, Math.min(100, ranked.length)));
const medium = uniqueByWord(mediumBase.length >= 35 ? mediumBase : ranked.slice(Math.min(20, ranked.length), Math.min(140, ranked.length)));
const hardFallback = ranked.filter((entry) => entry.avgPerConference >= BINGO_CONFIG.hardMinAveragePerConference).slice(Math.min(45, ranked.length), Math.min(180, ranked.length));
const hard = uniqueByWord(hardBase.length >= 35 ? hardBase : hardFallback);
const random = uniqueByWord([...easy, ...medium, ...hard]);

const pools = {
easy,
medium,
hard,
random
};

return pools[difficulty] || pools.easy;
}

function uniqueByWord(entries) {
const seen = new Set();
const unique = [];

for (const entry of entries) {
if (!entry || !entry.word || seen.has(entry.word)) {
continue;
}
seen.add(entry.word);
unique.push(entry);
}

return unique;
}

function shuffle(items) {
const copy = [...items];
for (let index = copy.length - 1; index > 0; index -= 1) {
const swapIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * (index + 1));
[copy[index], copy[swapIndex]] = [copy[swapIndex], copy[index]];
}
return copy;
}

function prettyDifficulty(value) {
switch (value) {
case 'easy':
return 'Easy';
case 'medium':
return 'Medium';
case 'hard':
return 'Hard';
case 'random':
return 'Random';
default:
return 'Easy';
}
}

function createCardData(settings) {
const { stats, conferenceCount, talkCount } = getWordStatsForRange(settings.yearFrom, settings.yearTo);

if (conferenceCount === 0 || talkCount === 0) {
throw new Error('No conference talks were found in that year range.');
}

const pool = getDifficultyPool(stats, settings.difficulty);
const requiredWords = settings.useFreeSpace ? 24 : 25;

if (pool.length < requiredWords) {
throw new Error('There are not enough eligible Gospel-focused conference words in that year range. Try widening the year range or choosing an easier difficulty.');
}

const picked = shuffle(pool).slice(0, requiredWords);
const cells = picked.map((entry) => ({
word: entry.word,
isFree: false
}));

if (settings.useFreeSpace) {
cells.splice(12, 0, {
word: 'FREE',
isFree: true
});
}

return {
title: `${prettyDifficulty(settings.difficulty)} Conference Bingo`,
difficulty: prettyDifficulty(settings.difficulty),
yearFrom: settings.yearFrom,
yearTo: settings.yearTo,
conferenceCount,
talkCount,
cells
};
}

function createCardElement(card) {
const shell = document.createElement('div');
shell.className = 'gb-bingo-card-shell';

const cardElement = document.createElement('article');
cardElement.className = 'gb-bingo-card';

const header = document.createElement('div');
header.className = 'gb-bingo-card__header';

const heading = document.createElement('div');

const title = document.createElement('h3');
title.className = 'gb-bingo-card__title';
title.textContent = 'General Conference Bingo';

const meta = document.createElement('p');
meta.className = 'gb-bingo-card__eyebrow';
meta.textContent = `${card.difficulty} difficulty`;

heading.append(title, meta);

const logo = document.createElement('img');
logo.className = 'gb-bingo-card__logo';
logo.src = BINGO_CONFIG.logoUrl;
logo.alt = 'Gospel Buddy logo';
logo.crossOrigin = 'anonymous';
logo.decoding = 'async';

header.append(heading, logo);

const main = document.createElement('div');
main.className = 'gb-bingo-card__main';

const gridFrame = document.createElement('div');
gridFrame.className = 'gb-bingo-grid-frame';

const grid = document.createElement('div');
grid.className = 'gb-bingo-grid';

for (const cell of card.cells) {
const cellElement = document.createElement('div');
cellElement.className = `gb-bingo-cell${cell.isFree ? ' gb-bingo-cell--free' : ''}`;

const word = document.createElement('div');
word.className = 'gb-bingo-cell__word';
word.setAttribute('lang', 'en');
word.textContent = cell.word;

cellElement.append(word);
grid.appendChild(cellElement);
}

gridFrame.appendChild(grid);
main.appendChild(gridFrame);

const footer = document.createElement('div');
footer.className = 'gb-bingo-card__footer';

const spacer = document.createElement('div');
spacer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');

const footerBrand = document.createElement('div');
footerBrand.className = 'gb-bingo-card__footer-brand';

const footerText = document.createElement('span');
footerText.textContent = 'Powered by mygospelbuddy.com';

const footerLogo = document.createElement('img');
footerLogo.className = 'gb-bingo-card__footer-logo';
footerLogo.src = BINGO_CONFIG.logoUrl;
footerLogo.alt = '';
footerLogo.crossOrigin = 'anonymous';
footerLogo.decoding = 'async';

footerBrand.append(footerText, footerLogo);
footer.append(spacer, footerBrand);

cardElement.append(header, main, footer);
shell.appendChild(cardElement);

sizeCardGrid(cardElement);
fitCardWords(cardElement);
return shell;
}

function sizeCardGrid(cardElement) {
const main = cardElement.querySelector('.gb-bingo-card__main');
const frame = cardElement.querySelector('.gb-bingo-grid-frame');
if (!main || !frame) {
return;
}

const mainRect = main.getBoundingClientRect();
const gridSize = Math.floor(Math.min(mainRect.width, mainRect.height) * 0.9);
if (gridSize > 0) {
frame.style.setProperty('--grid-size', `${gridSize}px`);
}
}

function fitCardWords(cardElement) {
const words = Array.from(cardElement.querySelectorAll('.gb-bingo-cell__word'));
for (const word of words) {
fitWordToCell(word);
}
}

function fitWordToCell(wordElement) {
const cell = wordElement.parentElement;
if (!cell) {
return;
}

const text = (wordElement.textContent || '').trim();
const isPhrase = /\s/.test(text);

const maxWidth = Math.max(0, cell.clientWidth - 8);
const maxHeight = Math.max(0, cell.clientHeight - 8);

let fontSize = 16;
const minFontSize = 8.5;

wordElement.style.fontSize = `${fontSize}px`;
wordElement.style.lineHeight = isPhrase ? '1.08' : '1';
wordElement.style.whiteSpace = isPhrase ? 'normal' : 'nowrap';
wordElement.style.wordBreak = 'normal';
wordElement.style.overflowWrap = 'normal';
wordElement.style.hyphens = 'none';

if (isPhrase) {
wordElement.style.textWrap = 'pretty';
} else {
wordElement.style.textWrap = 'nowrap';
}

while (
fontSize > minFontSize &&
(wordElement.scrollWidth > maxWidth || wordElement.scrollHeight > maxHeight)
) {
fontSize -= 0.5;
wordElement.style.fontSize = `${fontSize}px`;
}
}

function waitForImageLoad(node) {
const images = Array.from(node.querySelectorAll('img'));
if (images.length === 0) {
return Promise.resolve();
}

return Promise.all(images.map((img) => {
if (img.complete) {
return Promise.resolve();
}
return new Promise((resolve) => {
img.addEventListener('load', resolve, { once: true });
img.addEventListener('error', resolve, { once: true });
});
}));
}

function renderCurrentCard(card, settings) {
elements.printArea.innerHTML = '';
elements.printArea.appendChild(createCardElement(card));
elements.summary.textContent = `Preview example • ${card.difficulty} difficulty • ${card.conferenceCount} conference(s) analyzed • ${card.talkCount} talk(s) in range • ${settings.yearFrom}–${settings.yearTo}`;
state.currentCard = { card, settings };
}

function setStatus(type, message, showSpinner = false) {
elements.status.className = `gb-status gb-status--${type} is-visible`;
elements.status.innerHTML = `${showSpinner ? '<span class="gb-status__spinner" aria-hidden="true"></span>' : ''}${message}`;
}

function clearStatus() {
elements.status.className = 'gb-status';
elements.status.innerHTML = '';
}

function generateAndRenderCard(showReadyMessage) {
if (!state.ready) {
setStatus('info', 'Conference word pools are still loading…', true);
return;
}

const settings = getSettings();

try {
setStatus('info', 'Building your bingo card…', true);
const card = createCardData(settings);
renderCurrentCard(card, settings);
if (showReadyMessage) {
setStatus('success', 'New bingo card preview ready.');
} else {
clearStatus();
}
} catch (error) {
console.error(error);
elements.printArea.innerHTML = '<div class="gb-bingo-empty">No card could be generated with those settings.</div>';
elements.summary.textContent = 'Adjust the settings and try again.';
setStatus('error', error.message || 'Gospel Buddy could not generate a bingo card.');
}
}

async function exportPdfBatch() {
if (!state.ready) {
return;
}

const settings = getSettings();
const totalCards = settings.pdfCount;
const { jsPDF } = window.jspdf;

setStatus('info', `Creating ${totalCards} bingo PDF page${totalCards === 1 ? '' : 's'}…`, true);
elements.pdfStage.innerHTML = '';

try {
const pdf = new jsPDF({
orientation: 'portrait',
unit: 'pt',
format: 'letter'
});

for (let index = 0; index < totalCards; index += 1) {
const card = createCardData(settings);
const node = createCardElement(card);
elements.pdfStage.appendChild(node);

await waitForNextFrame();
await waitForImageLoad(node);
sizeCardGrid(node.querySelector('.gb-bingo-card'));
fitCardWords(node.querySelector('.gb-bingo-card'));
await waitForNextFrame();

const canvas = await html2canvas(node, {
backgroundColor: '#ffffff',
scale: 2,
useCORS: true
});

const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
const pageWidth = pdf.internal.pageSize.getWidth();
const pageHeight = pdf.internal.pageSize.getHeight();
const margin = 28;

const ratio = Math.min(
(pageWidth - margin * 2) / canvas.width,
(pageHeight - margin * 2) / canvas.height
);

const renderWidth = canvas.width * ratio;
const renderHeight = canvas.height * ratio;
const offsetX = (pageWidth - renderWidth) / 2;
const offsetY = (pageHeight - renderHeight) / 2;

if (index > 0) {
pdf.addPage();
}

pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', offsetX, offsetY, renderWidth, renderHeight, undefined, 'FAST');
node.remove();
}

const safeDifficulty = prettyDifficulty(settings.difficulty).toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '-');
const safePages = totalCards === 1 ? '1-page' : `${totalCards}-pages`;
pdf.save(`general-conference-bingo-${safeDifficulty}-${safePages}.pdf`);
setStatus('success', `PDF ready: ${totalCards} bingo page${totalCards === 1 ? '' : 's'} generated.`);
} catch (error) {
console.error(error);
setStatus('error', 'Gospel Buddy could not create the bingo PDF. Please try again.');
} finally {
elements.pdfStage.innerHTML = '';
}
}

function waitForNextFrame() {
return new Promise((resolve) => {
window.requestAnimationFrame(() => {
window.requestAnimationFrame(resolve);
});
});
}
</script>
